scripts.db:migrate: prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/001_university_platform.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/002_users_visibility_and_role_lock.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/003_google_oauth_student.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/004_ensure_auth_profile.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/006_project_full_submission.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/007_student_project_members_rls.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/008_create_student_project_rpc.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/009_update_student_project_paths_rpc.sql && prisma db execute --file supabase/migrations/010_finalize_student_submission_rpc.sql
scripts.db:sync: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:pull && npm run db:generate
